creator: melifaro@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the report!

Indeed, the system should not crash on any userland input. The fix for the issue is in 13-STABLE: https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?h=stable/13&id=e86f5d4fcba8baa6dd3539e595b199035426d262

I don't think it'll make it's way to 13-R, so if multipath is a desired feature, I'd recommend considering using 13-S.
